name: BlackBoxStocks
description_short: AI-powered options flow scanner and stock screener with real-time alerts, dark pool data, and an active trading community.
description_long:
BlackBoxStocks combines options flow scanning, stock screening, and community-driven trading into a single platform. The system uses proprietary algorithms to identify unusual options activity and high-probability setups across the entire US equities and options market.

The platform stands out for its real-time alert system that flags unusual volume spikes, large block trades, and dark pool activity. Traders can filter by sector, market cap, option type, premium size, and dozens of other criteria. The built-in stock screener runs alongside the options flow scanner, giving users a comprehensive view of market activity.

BlackBoxStocks also includes a live trading community with chat rooms, educational webinars, and real-time trade sharing. The Pro tier adds advanced analytics, historical flow data, and priority alert delivery. At $79.97/month (or $959.64/year), it sits in the mid-range of options flow tools — cheaper than FlowAlgo but more expensive than basic screeners.
pros: Combines options flow + stock screener in one platform
Active trading community with live chat
cons: No free tier or trial period
No broker integration for direct trading
